Parameter.name: Patlist
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets Patlist to execute the timing calibration on.

Parameter.name: MaskPins
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

Parameter.name: TimingCalibratePins
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated pins for timing calibration.

Parameter.name: TimingCalibrationNames
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated Params for timing calibration.(it is parameter TimingCalibrateTxNames, its for backward competibility)

Parameter.name: TimingCalibrateTxNames
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated TX param for timing calibration.

Parameter.name: TimingCalibrateRxNames
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated RX param for timing calibration.

Parameter.name: TimingCalPatmodConfiguration
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the configuration to patch the termination codes in the timing calibration pattern.

Parameter.name: StartLargeOffset
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the static value for the starting point in the Y axis for the 1D shmoo.

Parameter.name: XAxisDriveOffsetParameter
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the name of the global drive offset parameter for the RX pins. XAxisDriveOffsetParameter is deprecated, please use SmallCalibrationOffsetParameter and LargeCalibrationOffsetParameter.

Parameter.name: SmallCalibrationOffsetParameter
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the name of the global drive/strobe offset parameter. Use along with LargeCalibrationOffsetParameter and CalibrationMode parameters.

Parameter.name: YAxisStrobeOffsetParameter
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the name of the global strobe offset parameter for the TX pins. YAxisStrobeOffsetParameter is deprecated, please use SmallCalibrationOffsetParameter and LargeCalibrationOffsetParameter.

Parameter.name: LargeCalibrationOffsetParameter
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the name of the global drive/strobe offset parameter. Use along with SmallCalibrationOffsetParameter and CalibrationMode parameters.

Parameter.name: TimingsTc
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

Parameter.name: TimingCalibrationRange
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the maximum swing range for the timing calibration to take place.

Parameter.name: CalTDRRegisterFieldSequence
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the field sequence value of the cal tdr register to be patmod into the pattern.

Parameter.name: OutputTokenPrefix
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the prefix used in the output timing token.

Parameter.name: OutputTokenPostfix
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the postfix used in the output timing token, leave empty for no post fix.

Parameter.name: EyeWidthLimit
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the eyewidth limit.

Parameter.name: ResetToNominal
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the option to restore the timing specs after the test is executed.

Parameter.name: CalibrationMode
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets calibration mode.

Parameter.name: MaxCaptures
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets maximum number of captures admited before pattern execution is stopped.

Parameter.name: LevelsTc
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets LevelsTc for plist execution.

Parameter.name: ExecutionMode
Parameter.descriptions: The Execution Mode of Calibration and Override.

Parameter.name: TimingOverrideDriveParams
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the name of the global drive offset parameter for Timing Override.

Parameter.name: TimingOverrideDriveValues
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param, can be a number or SharedstorageToken.

Parameter.name: TimingOverrideDriveOffset
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the value for additional offset require for drive param.

Parameter.name: TimingOverrideStrobeParams
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated params of the name of the perpin strobe offset parameter.

Parameter.name: TimingOverrideStrobeValues
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param, can be a number or SharedstorageToken.

Parameter.name: VoxTxOverridePins
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param, can be a number or SharedstorageToken.

Parameter.name: VoxRxOverridePins
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param, can be a number or SharedstorageToken.

Parameter.name: VoxTxOverrideParams
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param.

Parameter.name: VoxRxOverrideParams
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param.

Parameter.name: VoxSupplyParam
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets Vox Supply Parameter.

ExitPort.PortDescriptions: PORT FAIL FOR SW ERROR CONDITION
PORT FAIL FOR HW ALARM CONDITION
